SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign

Class UtilityCompressionOptimizer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.utilitydesign.UtilityCompressionOptimizer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UtilityCompressionOptimizer extends Object implements Serializable
Closed-loop optimizer for a two-stage utility-gas compression package (instrument air, fuel gas, or an export booster).

The class builds a real NeqSim flowsheet — feed stream → first-stage Compressor → intercooler Cooler → second-stage Compressor → delivery — and drives the interstage pressure with the agentic AgenticProcessOptimizer to minimize the total shaft power. With equal intercooling temperature and equal stage efficiency, the analytic optimum interstage pressure is the geometric mean of the inlet and delivery pressures, sqrt(pIn * pOut); the optimizer rediscovers it from the live flowsheet without being told.

This couples the deterministic utility-design package to the agentic optimization stack: the flowsheet is the black-box reward model, the interstage pressure is the single decision variable, and the summed compressor power is the cost. The result is schema-versioned and reproducible for a fixed seed.

Usage example: 

 
 UtilityCompressionOptimizer opt = new UtilityCompressionOptimizer("Instrument Air");
 opt.setInletPressureBara(5.0);
 opt.setDeliveryPressureBara(60.0);
 opt.optimize();
 double pMid = opt.getOptimumInterstagePressureBara();
 double power = opt.getMinTotalPowerKW();
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • UtilityCompressionOptimizer

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer()
      Creates an optimizer with the default name.

    • UtilityCompressionOptimizer

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer(String name)
      Creates an optimizer with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the package name; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • setInletPressureBara

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer setInletPressureBara(double inletPressureBara)
      Sets the compressor suction pressure.
      Parameters:
      inletPressureBara - suction pressure [bara]; must be positive and below the delivery pressure
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if inletPressureBara is not positive

    • setDeliveryPressureBara

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer setDeliveryPressureBara(double deliveryPressureBara)
      Sets the delivery (final) pressure.
      Parameters:
      deliveryPressureBara - delivery pressure [bara]; must be positive
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if deliveryPressureBara is not positive

    • setInletTempC

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer setInletTempC(double inletTempC)
      Sets the feed temperature.
      Parameters:
      inletTempC - feed temperature [degC]
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining

    • setIntercoolerTempC

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer setIntercoolerTempC(double intercoolerTempC)
      Sets the intercooler outlet temperature.
      Parameters:
      intercoolerTempC - intercooler outlet temperature [degC]
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining

    • setFlowRateKgh

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer setFlowRateKgh(double flowRateKgh)
      Sets the utility-gas mass flow.
      Parameters:
      flowRateKgh - mass flow [kg/hr]; must be positive
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if flowRateKgh is not positive

    • setFluid

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer setFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
      Supplies a custom utility-gas fluid; when not set a default dry-air fluid is used. The fluid is cloned internally.
      Parameters:
      fluid - the fluid to compress, or null to use the default dry-air fluid
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining

    • setSeed

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer setSeed(long seed)
      Sets the deterministic optimizer seed.
      Parameters:
      seed - the random seed
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining

    • setMaxEvaluations

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer setMaxEvaluations(int maxEvaluations)
      Sets the optimizer evaluation budget.
      Parameters:
      maxEvaluations - maximum number of evaluations; must be at least 2
      Returns:
      this optimizer, for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if maxEvaluations < 2

    • optimize

      public UtilityCompressionOptimizer optimize()
      Builds the two-stage compression flowsheet and runs the agentic optimizer to minimize total shaft power over the interstage pressure.
      Returns:
      this optimizer, with results populated
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the inlet pressure is not below the delivery pressure

    • defaultAirFluid

      private SystemInterface defaultAirFluid()
      Builds the default dry-air working fluid (79 mol% N2, 21 mol% O2).
      Returns:
      a configured SRK air fluid

    • getOptimumInterstagePressureBara

      public double getOptimumInterstagePressureBara()
      Returns the optimized interstage pressure.
      Returns:
      interstage pressure [bara]

    • getMinTotalPowerKW

      public double getMinTotalPowerKW()
      Returns the minimum total shaft power found.
      Returns:
      total power [kW]

    • getGeometricMeanPressureBara

      public double getGeometricMeanPressureBara()
      Returns the analytic geometric-mean interstage pressure sqrt(pIn * pOut).
      Returns:
      geometric-mean pressure [bara]

    • getEvaluations

      public int getEvaluations()
      Returns the number of optimizer evaluations performed.
      Returns:
      evaluation count

    • isFeasible

      public boolean isFeasible()
      Returns whether the optimization produced a feasible point.
      Returns:
      true if feasible

    • getResult

      public AgenticProcessOptimizer.OptimizationResult getResult()
      Returns the underlying optimizer result, or null if optimize() has not been called.
      Returns:
      the optimization result

    • toResultsMap

      public Map<String,Object> toResultsMap()
      Returns the results as an ordered map.
      Returns:
      a map of result fields

    • toJson

      Serializes the results to pretty-printed JSON.
      Returns:
      the JSON string
